footer.text: Made with paws, use at own risk

koans.empty-hint: The scroll is empty. Behold the wisdom of ages — or seek it yourself.
koans.error-network: The monastery is unreachable. Check your connection.
koans.error-not-found: This koan is not among the scrolls.
koans.error-generic: The scroll is unavailable. The master bids you wait and try again.
